name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers at 13520 Euclid Ave, East Cleveland, OH 44112 is open 24 hours daily. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.8 stars across 600 reviews. Call +1 216-451-7994.
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates PLS Check Cashers as a multi-state check-cashing and financial services network with locations in Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. The company has been established as a registered service mark of PLS Financial Services, Inc. since at least 2018.

PLS offers a comprehensive suite of financial and administrative services beyond check cashing. Core money services include check cashing, money orders, bill payment, Ria Money Transfer, government benefits payment, and foreign exchange. They also provide vehicle-related services including registration and renewals, title transfers, license plates, and city stickers/transit cards. Additional offerings include prepaid debit cards (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard), business services through PLS For Business, fax and copy services, notary services, ATM access, phone top-ups, and cash and coin services.

PLS distinguishes itself through round-the-clock 24/7 operations at its locations, eliminating time constraints for consumers needing financial services. The company combines traditional check-cashing functions with governmental services (vehicle registration, license renewals) in a single location, creating convenience for customers managing multiple financial and administrative needs. Their multi-state presence and diverse service offerings position them as a more comprehensive alternative to standalone check-cashing operations.

As a check-cashing service, PLS caters to unbanked and underbanked populations seeking alternatives to traditional banks. However, check-cashing services typically charge fees for transactions and do not build credit history. Consumers should be aware that while PLS offers financial services, they function as a transaction processor rather than a credit-building institution, making them suitable for immediate financial needs rather than long-term financial development.
pros: 24/7 operating hours at all locations for round-the-clock access to financial services
Multi-state presence across 12 states provides geographic accessibility for customers
Comprehensive service offering combining check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and vehicle registration in single locations
Ria Money Transfer partnership enables domestic and international money transfers
Notary services available for legal documents (wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney)
Prepaid debit card option (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard) with mobile app access
Additional convenience services including fax, copy, ATM access, and phone top-ups
cons: Check-cashing services charge fees for transactions, making them more expensive than traditional bank checking accounts
No credit-building benefits—transactions with PLS do not contribute to credit history or credit score improvement
Limited to financial transactions and administrative services without lending, savings, or investment products
As a check-cashing operation, primarily serves unbanked/underbanked populations rather than those seeking comprehensive banking
Recent privacy policy updates may indicate data collection practices that warrant consumer review
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing and bill payment services
Individuals requiring government benefits payment or money transfer services without bank accounts
People needing vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plate services bundled with financial services
Consumers in 12-state service area seeking 24/7 access to notary services and document authentication
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in its 12-state service area who need immediate access to check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and administrative services like vehicle registration—particularly those who value 24/7 availability. The primary caveat is that check-cashing services charge transaction fees and do not build credit history, making them suitable for one-time or immediate financial needs rather than long-term financial development or account building.
